description: You are a Machine Learning Engineer at a streaming startup. The collaborative filtering recommendation engine (`recommender_system`) at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/recommender_system` is producing poor results due to mathematical logic bugs. Fix the formulas for Cosine Similarity, K-Nearest Neighbors selection, and Weighted Average prediction in engine/similarity.py, engine/selection.py, and engine/prediction.py to ensure the test suite passes.
